assertion_results.text: Duplicate check searches for sibling issues using JQL with the CVE label and excludes the current issue key (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: In duplicate-check.md, Section 4.0 shows the JQL query: 'project = TC AND labels = 'CVE-2026-31812' AND issuetype = 10024 AND key != TC-8003'. This query searches by the CVE label (CVE-2026-31812) and explicitly excludes the current issue key (key != TC-8003).

assertion_results.text: Duplicate check correctly classifies TC-7999 as a same-stream sibling (both have stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2]) and identifies it as a duplicate (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: In duplicate-check.md, Section 4.1 states: 'Classification: Same-stream sibling -- both TC-8003 and TC-7999 carry the stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2], mapping to the same 2.2.x version stream.' The stream comparison table shows both issues with stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2] and mapped stream 2.2.x. The section concludes TC-7999 is a same-stream sibling and recommends closing TC-8003 as Duplicate.

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing TC-8003 as Duplicate with resolution 'Duplicate', referencing TC-7999 as the original (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: In triage-outcome.md, the decision heading reads: 'Decision: Close as Duplicate of TC-7999'. The proposed Jira mutations include: 'Transition TC-8003 to Closed with resolution "Duplicate"'. In duplicate-check.md, the recommendation states: 'Close TC-8003 as Duplicate of TC-7999.' with proposed action to 'Transition TC-8003 to Closed with resolution Duplicate'.

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting why it is a duplicate — same CVE tracked for the same stream (Step 4.1)
assertion_results.evidence: Both duplicate-check.md and triage-outcome.md include a proposed comment for TC-8003: 'Duplicate of TC-7999 -- same CVE (CVE-2026-31812) tracked for the same stream [rhtpa-2.2]. TC-7999 is already In Progress with Affects Versions [RHTPA 2.2.0, RHTPA 2.2.1] and covers this issue's scope entirely. Closing as duplicate. Version impact analysis confirms overlap: both issues target the 2.2.x stream where quinn-proto ships at versions below the 0.11.14 fix threshold.' This clearly documents the same CVE and same stream rationale.

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT proceed to remediation task creation — duplicate detection short-circuits the triage flow
assertion_results.evidence: In duplicate-check.md, Sections 4.3 and 4.4 are explicitly marked 'Skipped. Duplicate detection in Step 4.1 short-circuits the triage'. In triage-outcome.md, the 'What is NOT done (short-circuited by duplicate detection)' section explicitly lists 'Step 7 (Remediation Task Creation) -- not needed; any remediation tasks belong under TC-7999, not this duplicate. Creating tasks under TC-8003 would result in duplicate remediation work.' No remediation task creation file exists in the outputs directory.
